name: Goldman Sachs
interviewFormat: Multiple rounds: quantitative assessment, 2-3 technical interviews, behavioral/fit, superday (multiple back-to-back interviews)
questionPatterns: design a real-time trading system with low latency
explain the CAP theorem and how it applies to financial data
how would you design a risk management system
tell me about a time you worked on a high-stakes project with tight deadlines
how do you handle conflicting priorities from multiple stakeholders
